ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Whether the property is waterfront */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the property */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the property */,
  "yr_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "yr_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was renovated */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the property */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property type */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in acres */,
  "heating" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood of the location */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the sale belongs to */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price of the sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who bought the property */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who sold the property */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission percentage for the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was finalized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the agent belongs to */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "rating" REAL /* Agent's rating based on customer feedback */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Customer's preferred contact method */,
  "preferred_property_type" TEXT /* Customer's preferred type of property */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Customer's budget for property purchases */,
  "status" TEXT /* Customer's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being favorited */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who favorited the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the contact */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who was contacted */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was made */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method of contact (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sales */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales made by the agent */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office the report is for */,
  "number_of_sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales made by the agent */,
  "average_sale_price" INTEGER /* Average sale price of properties sold by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES agents ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was reported */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the trend is for */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
